backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing inventory management, recipe management, and session-based authentication with types for ingredients, recipes, bowl sizes, and functions for CRUD operations on ingredients and recipes.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Internet Identity auth, inventory management, menu management, billing, dashboard) to their corresponding files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing one-line summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and utilities for the Salad Khatora application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes with neutral grayscale colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Salad Khatora application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with routes for login, dashboard, inventory, menu, sales, subscriptions, and customers pages, wrapped in QueryClient, AuthProvider, and ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/IngredientForm.t: React form component for adding/editing ingredients with fields for name, quantity, unit (grams/kg), cost price, supplier, and low stock threshold using react-hook-form and backend mutations.
frontend/src/components/IngredientList.t: Grid display component rendering ingredient cards with quantity, cost, supplier, threshold info, low stock badges, and edit buttons.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component that provides navigation header, mobile menu, notification panel, and authentication-based routing. Renders a loading state while checking auth and redirects to login if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/components/NotificationPane: Popover component that displays a scrollable list of notifications with icons, timestamps, and actions to mark as read or dismiss. Shows badge with notification count.
frontend/src/components/RecipeForm.tsx: Form component for creating and editing recipes with bowl size selection and dynamic ingredient list management. Handles conversion of form data to RecipeInput format and submits via mutations.
frontend/src/components/RecipeList.tsx: Displays recipes in a grid of cards showing recipe name, bowl size badge, ingredient list with quantities, and edit button. Fetches ingredient names from the ingredients query.
frontend/src/contexts/AuthContext.tsx: Authentication context provider that manages Internet Identity login state, session creation/destruction, and persists session ID to localStorage. Exposes authentication status and login/logout functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches the backend actor with proper identity configuration. Invalidates dependent queries when actor changes due to authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for managing login flow, identity state, and AuthClient lifecycle. Includes provider component and useInternetIdentity hook for accessing auth state.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Custom hook that manages notifications (low-stock alerts, subscription expiry) by fetching low-stock ingredients, persisting notifications to localStorage, and providing methods to mark as read or dismiss.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching and mutating ingredients, recipes, inventory state, and low-stock items via the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation on mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components (primary, secondary, destructive, etc.) and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CustomersPage.tsx: Placeholder page for customer management functionality with a coming-soon message.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard displaying key metrics (total inventory value, ingredient count, low-stock alerts, sales) with stat cards and a welcome message.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Inventory management page with ingredient list, add/edit dialog, CSV export functionality, and total inventory value display.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication button that redirects to dashboard after successful authentication.
frontend/src/pages/MenuPage.tsx: Menu management page for creating and editing recipes with a list view and add/edit dialog.
frontend/src/pages/SalesPage.tsx: Placeholder page for sales and billing functionality with a coming-soon message.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionsPage.tsx: Placeholder page for subscription management functionality with a coming-soon message.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility function to export array data to CSV format with proper escaping and automatic file download with timestamped filename.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space with CSS variables, extended theme settings including container, border radius, fonts (Inter), shadows, and accordion animations. Includes typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document describing a full-stack Salad Khatora business management system with inventory tracking, menu management, billing, subscriptions, dashboard analytics, Internet Identity authentication, customer database, and mobile-friendly UI with white/green theme. Lists implemented features including inventory management, recipe-to-ingredient mapping, automatic inventory deduction, billing system, and dashboard with sales/profit tracking.
